reasoning: Emotional (60%): The button uses warm orange/amber on the beetle icon and a tan/cream circular body — warm and not grim, but the overall palette skews earthy and muted rather than the saturated greens/blues/yellows/pinks expected of Zelda EoW. The beetle silhouette reads friendly and the round octagonal button shape is charming, but the dominant tan-beige-brown range suppresses the 'bright/toy-diorama Hyrule' mood. Score ~6/10 emotional. Technical (40%): Hard 1px dark outlines are present and consistent; shading on both the beetle and button rim uses 2-3 hard tones with no anti-aliasing; pixels are grid-snapped and the work reads as hand-pixeled. Minor: the rim dither pattern is slightly noisy but within tolerance. Score ~7/10 technical. Weighted: 0.6×6 + 0.4×7 = 6.4 → 6. Marginal — technically sound but emotionally under-saturated for the target style.
